reasoning: While overall fidelity scores are high, there is a significant discrepancy regarding document structure; the programmatic check flagged a fabricated table while the LLM fidelity report noted visual degradation in the 'NG 911 Fund' section. The collapse of multi-line financial data into single text blocks without proper indentation makes the document difficult to parse and potentially misleading, requiring human intervention to ensure government record standards.

concerns.description: Fabricated tables: baseline has 0 tables but output has 1

concerns.analysis: The visual quality is degraded within several table cells (specifically items 5 and 6) because multi-line content and sub-items from the PDF have been collapsed into single text blocks. In the source PDF, financial figures and sub-points are clearly separated on new lines with indentation/alignment. In the HTML, they run together without proper spacing, making specific sections like the 'NG 911 Fund' summary difficult to parse.
